meaning: adj.自负的,喜夸耀的,自夸的
examples: I tried to emphasize my good points without sounding boastful.
You're just a boastful (自夸的), spoiled alien.
Then post the photo with a short tweet that gives context without seeming too boastful.
There's some hubris in this kind of talk--but Ghosn is entitled to be boastful.
